item.title: Version 3.5.2
item.description:
Sonotexta 3.5.2

  • Fixed: audio capture broken after v3.5 voice processing change (all engines)
  • Fixed: profiles no longer lost on update (migration-safe decoder for new fields)
  • Improved mic sharing — proper voice processing API with progressive retry for FaceTime/Zoom
  • Input language per profile — tell the speech engine and AI what language you’re speaking for better accuracy on short phrases and similar languages
  • Improved FaceTime/Zoom mic sharing — voice processing API for reliable concurrent mic access
  • Updates tab — release history and check for updates from Settings
  • Support page — privacy, terms, website, and contact links in Settings
  • Fixed: dictation now stops reliably with local engines (Whisper, Parakeet)
  • Fixed: AI no longer interprets your dictation as instructions
  • Fixed: duplicate default profiles can now be deleted
  • Clearer AI setup — Ollama highlighted as free local option
  • Sonotexta AI and Cloud subscriptions, 8 AI presets, microphone selection, dictation stats

item.title: Version 2.2.1
item.description:
What's New in Sonotexta 2.2.1

  • Fixed clipboard keeping raw text instead of AI-translated result

item.title: Version 2.2
item.description:
What's New in Sonotexta 2.2

  • Keep in clipboard — optionally keep transcription in clipboard for re-pasting
  • Configurable paste delay for VMs and remote desktop apps

item.title: Version 2.1
item.description:
What's New in Sonotexta 2.1

  • Single-key shortcuts — use F-keys or Logitech dedicated buttons as dictation trigger
  • Fixed Globe key crash on some keyboard configurations
  • FaceTime/Zoom mic sharing — dictate while on a call

item.title: Version 2.0
item.description:
What's New in Sonotexta 2.0

  • Sonotexta Pro store live — production Lemon Squeezy checkout
  • Buy button on website with overlay purchase flow

item.title: Version 1.9
item.description:
What's New in Sonotexta 1.9

  • Deepgram Nova-3 — 5th speech engine, WebSocket streaming, half the price of OpenAI
  • 10 languages with real-time code-switching
  • Fixed Gemini provider — updated to 2.5 Flash/Pro

item.title: Version 1.7
item.description:
What's New in Sonotexta 1.7

  • Automatic updates via Sparkle
  • Multilingual dictation with 4 speech engines
  • OpenAI Realtime streaming transcription
  • Per-app profiles with contact detection
  • Hold-to-talk dictation mode
